description_long: This house features a steeply pitched red gable roof with a prominent front-facing gable and a circular window above the main entrance. The exterior walls are clad in light brown siding, complemented by white-framed windows and trim. The front entryway is defined by a small set of steps leading to a covered porch with a light blue awning. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with the side elevations displaying pairs of rectangular windows. The house sits on a low, light gray foundation, and the overall design is simple yet inviting, reminiscent of traditional suburban homes. The structure appears to be a single-story dwelling with a spacious attic or loft area under the high roof.
description: A single-story house with a steep red gable roof, light brown siding, white-trimmed windows, and a covered front porch with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a blue awning, a circular window above the door, and symmetrical white windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gable roof, two pairs of white windows, and the extension of the porch roof visible at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the expanse of the red gable roof and a single centered window on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with two pairs of white windows and the porch roof edge visible at the back.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, a small covered porch, and a light blue awning, topped by a circular window.
